ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number assigned to the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the student is enrolled */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the student */,
  "parent_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Emergency contact number */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the student's photo */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "established_year" TEXT /* Year of establishment of the institution */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the institution's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the institution's logo */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled at the institution */,
  "total_courses" INTEGER /* Total number of courses offered by the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the examination center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the examination center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the examination center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the examination center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the center can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the course is offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of attendance in the course */,
  "instructor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the instructor about the student's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade awarded (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date when the grade was awarded */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who awarded the grade */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Instructor's comments on the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the attendance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who recorded the attendance */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom where the attendance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the exam */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the exam */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exam */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who will proctor the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., exam, registration) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., enrollment, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is editable by users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
